description: A plain candid operational photograph (the second of a paired set in the tweet) with no added graphic design or on-image text. It is a chaotic street scene apparently captured through a vehicle windshield (the car's dashboard and hood are visible in the foreground). On a residential street lined with bare leafless trees and parked vehicles, numerous tactical agents in plain clothes with visible badges and tactical vests are conducting an at-large arrest, surrounding a dark SUV; one agent in the right foreground wears a helmet, balaclava/face covering, and a long-sleeve tactical top. A white work van marked 'Panorama Remodel...' is parked at right. The lighting is overcast/dusk. The tweet uses this image to depict the 'dangerous' at-large street arrest contrasted against a controlled jail handover. This is documentary/operational photography, not a designed meme or poster; marked is_designed=false.
notable_text: (no designed on-image text; visible signage: 'Panorama Remodel...' on a parked work van)
